TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-frog_aking 2020s

S.FORM: a rmengo ku kingan n nodaan laqi rseno.
S.TRANSL: 我要講有關一個男孩的故事。
I am going to tell a story about a boy.

S.FORM: laqi rseno nii malu ba lngelungan na.
S.TRANSL: 這位男孩，他心腸很好。
The boy, he had a kind heart.

S.FORM: dmanga kingan huling ma kingan qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 他養了一隻狗以及一隻青蛙。
He kept a dog and a frog as pet.

S.FORM: ma mqaras riyung ka huling na duri.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗也非常的高興。
His dog was also very happy.

S.FORM: rung qmita qpatun ka laqi rseno ga do qmita siyo na ka huling ga duri.
S.TRANSL: 當男孩看青蛙的時候，狗也看著它。
When the boy looked at the frog, the dog was also looking at it.

S.FORM: dmedax di tutui ka laqi rseno gaga.
S.TRANSL: 天亮了,小男孩起床了。
At dawn, the boy woke up.

S.FORM: naqah ba kuxun na a qmita ka laqi rseno nii.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩看到這樣感到很傷心。
The boy felt very sad seeing this.

S.FORM: ma mlukus plukus ye mmaha skadi qpatun na kiya.
S.TRANSL: 他著裝穿衣準備去尋找那隻青蛙。
He got dressed and set off to find his frog.

S.FORM: ma so ba ima ka huling na duri ini gdema s dmayo skadi laqi rseno kiya.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗也沒有閒著，也幫忙尋找(青蛙)。
His dog did not stay idle, and helped him search (for the frog).

S.FORM: ma ini kela ali lmawa qpatun ka laqi rseno nii raguhun na ka bais na quri nganguc lmawa qpatun na.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩卻也絲毫未察覺地，推著窗往外呼喊著他的青蛙。
The boy, on the other hand, did not seem to notice what was happening to his dog. He opened the window and called out to his frog.

S.FORM: wada ba sklui ka? laqi rseno gaga musa nganguc ma osaun na memux ka huling na.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩頓時驚訝得往外頭去，把他的狗兒抱著；
The boy was shocked, so he ran out to see if the dog was ok. When he got there, he hugged his dog.

S.FORM: ma mqaras bale ka huling na uh uh so myeha a qmita heya ka uh huling nii ma cehakun na dqeras na.
S.TRANSL: 狗兒卻很開心並感恩地舔著他的臉。
The dog was happy to see him and licked his face.

S.FORM: ma kika mddaha musa skadi yqeyaq hiya ka daha ka laqi rseno nii ka huling nii di moda lmiqu qpatun qpatun si lmawa.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣，這隻狗兒就和這個小男孩他們倆一起去田間尋找青蛙，走過森林。「青蛙！青蛙！」這樣喊著。
So the boy and the dog set off together to the fields and the forest to find the frog. The boy called, "Frog! Frog!"

S.FORM: ma qitaan na eniqan kingan beling ma mqiri beling kiya ka laqi rseno nii wa qiyucun qolic qtehur ngungu ka muhing na.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小洞口，小男孩看到了，便將頭往裡探，卻給田鼠咬了他的鼻子。
When they saw a small hole, the boy put his head in to see if the frog was there. Instead of finding the frog, the boy’s nose was bit by a field rat.

S.FORM: ma ini kela ali ga skadi a qpatun ka huling na ga duri.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗兒也很專心地找著青蛙。
His dog also tried hard to find the frog.

S.FORM: osaun na lngelu ka qhuni paru ga ini na qitai ka tdiyung a gaga m baro hiya.
S.TRANSL: 牠晃動一顆很大的樹，但卻沒發現裡面有虎頭蜂。
It shook a very big tree, but did not realize that it had bees in it.

S.FORM: qpatun qpatun bale sa d skadi qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 「青蛙，青蛙呀！」(小男孩)這麼說著，尋找著青蛙。
"Frog! Frog!" (the boy) yelled searching for the frog.

S.FORM: ma mdakin qhuni baro ka laqi rseno nii ini kelai tuting a a nrgeruyan na ka rudu tdiyung ka huling nii tmalang sdurakun na tdiyung.
S.TRANSL: 而這個小男孩爬著樹，不知道他的狗兒因搖樹，讓虎頭蜂窩晃落在地正跑著被虎頭蜂追逐。
And the boy climbed the tree, not knowing that his dog was chased by the bees because it shook the tree and made the bee hive fall.

S.FORM: moda s moda berih na laqi a rseno ga ka tdiyung duri tuting kndalax qhuni baro ka laqi rseno.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂經過小男孩的前面；而小男孩從樹上掉落在地上。
The bees passed by the boy and the boy fell off the tree to the ground.

S.FORM: sklui qmita ka tuy tyaqung gaga siyo hiya.
S.TRANSL: 在一旁的烏鴉看得都嚇了一跳。
The crow nearby was shocked seeing this.

S.FORM: ma kedu ba knnarux tunux mu ha mesa ka laqi rseno dmoi tunux na ma qmita bale ka tyaqung ssiyo hiya.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩邊摸著自己的頭邊叫著：「我的頭好痛啊！」烏鴉在旁凝視著。
"My head hurts so badly!" said the boy, holdin his own head. The crow was watching nearby.

S.FORM: ma mdakin qho uh btunux baro ma ye na seedan so cida ka laqi rseno ga lmawa qpatun na.
S.TRANSL: 接著，小男孩爬到一顆石頭上面，依附在像是樹枝的東西前，呼喊著他的青蛙。
Then, the boy climbed up to a stone, and leaned against something like a branch, calling out to his frog.

S.FORM: qmita ssiyo ka qbheni duri qpatun qpatun bale si ga lmawa.
S.TRANSL: 小鳥在一旁看著，小男孩則是「青蛙啊！青蛙！」地呼喊著。
The birds were watching nearby, the boy calling out: "Frog! Frog!"

S.FORM: sklui ka dn dnoi na ka so hari ka cida qhuni kiya kela naq rqenux.
S.TRANSL: 他依靠著的、扶著的像樹枝狀的東西，原來是隻鹿。
The thing that the boy leaned against was actually the horn of a deer rather than a branch.

S.FORM: sklui ka rqenux tmalang mbahang kari na.
S.TRANSL: 這隻鹿聽到小男孩的聲音，便嚇得跑了起來。
The dear was shocked, and started to run, hearing the boy’s voice.

S.FORM: ma qmita wa tulusun na rqenux na ka huling na smdurik siyo na duri tmalang betaq berih na.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗兒看到他被那鹿兒拖著，也跑在旁邊直奔到他的前方，
The dog saw the deer dragging the boy, so it chased them, and ran to the front.

S.FORM: ini na kelai ka kdere berih hiya ma.
S.TRANSL: 但牠卻不知道前方就是陡坡。
However, it did not know that there was a steep slope in the front.

S.FORM: wada tuting truma hiya ka laqi rseno ma kana huling sklui mita ka rqenux ssiyo hiya.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩連同狗兒全都掉落到山崖下去了；旁邊的鹿看著也嚇呆了。
Both the boy and the dog fell off the cliff. The deer, who was watching beside, was shocked.

S.FORM: ma wada tuting yayung truma tuting rcilung ruru hiya.
S.TRANSL: (他們)掉落到河裡，掉落在深的溪裡；
(They) fell into the river, which was a deep creek.

S.FORM: ma bale tutui wa laqi rseno gaga ma angalun na baro kana ka huling na.
S.TRANSL: 而那個小男孩竟然還能起來，還將他的狗兒抬起到水面之上。
To one’s surprise, the boy was still able to stand up, holding his dog high up.

S.FORM: mqaras bale ma a in a mddaha ini so uh wada so ini so mangan ini hangan luqah.
S.TRANSL: 兩個都很開心，也許是因為都沒有受到創傷，
Both of them were very happy, probably because they were not hurt.

S.FORM: ma thuwe a lmanguy musa ruru uh siyo hiya dehuk so qhuni hiya ma.
S.TRANSL: 接著他們便慢慢地游泳到溪邊的樹頭處。
Then, they swam slowly to one side of the creek where there was a tree.

S.FORM: iya squwaq kesaun na ka huling na.
S.TRANSL: 「不要說話。」他對著狗兒說。
The boy said to the dog, "Don’t speak!"

S.FORM: mddaha mkkaro qhuni baro.
S.TRANSL: 兩個一起攀爬上了樹頭，
Both of them climbed up a tree.

S.FORM: wa na sdiyalun hiya ka qpatun na di wa mddaha ga tuloung ssiyo qpatun hiya.
S.TRANSL: 在那裡，他們倆找到了男孩的青蛙。牠就坐在旁邊。
There, they found boy’s frog, which was sitting beside.

S.FORM: hbaro bale ka kana qpatun gaga s a kana theyaqan hiya.
S.TRANSL: 那裏也有很多青蛙的同伴。
Many companion frogs were there, too.

S.FORM: ye kela naq musa skadi dangi na mesa ka laqi rseno nii.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩也許心裡想著：「原來牠是去找朋友了！」
The boy probably thought: "It turns out that he went to look for his friends!"
